title: Autonomous Operation and Scheduling
interaction_flow: ReflectLoop → ReflectLoop: time.sleep(INTERVAL) [scheduler=120s, autonomous=1800s]
ReflectLoop → scheduler.check(): call check() every loop tick
scheduler.check() → compress_session.batch_process(): [every 12h] L4 cron — batch_process(raw_dir, dry_run=False)
compress_session.batch_process() → FileSystem: glob model_responses_*.txt, skip files <2h old
compress_session.batch_process() → compress_session.compress_session(): per file — strip sys prompt/assistant echo, rename MMDD_HHMM-MMDD_HHMM.txt
compress_session.batch_process() → FileSystem: append session blocks to all_histories.txt
compress_session.batch_process() → FileSystem: archive compressed files to YYYY-MM.zip
compress_session.batch_process() → FileSystem: delete processed raw files
compress_session.batch_process() → scheduler.check(): return stats dict
scheduler.check() → FileSystem: scan sche_tasks/*.json, filter enabled+schedule+cooldown
scheduler.check() → scheduler._parse_cooldown(repeat): compute cooldown timedelta
scheduler.check() → scheduler._last_run(tid, done_files): find latest done/{ts}_{tid}.md
scheduler.check() → ReflectLoop: return task prompt string (or None if no task due)
ReflectLoop → GeneraticAgent.put_task(task, source='reflect'): enqueue task, get display_queue
GeneraticAgent.run() → agent_runner_loop(llmclient, sys_prompt, user_input, handler, TOOLS_SCHEMA, max_turns=40): stream execution
agent_runner_loop → GeneraticAgent.run(): yield chunks → display_queue.put({'done': full_resp})
GeneraticAgent.run() → ReflectLoop: display_queue result consumed
ReflectLoop → FileSystem: write reflect_logs/{script}_{date}.log
ReflectLoop → mod.on_done(result): [optional] post-run callback
--- Autonomous path (user absent >30min) ---
ReflectLoop → autonomous.check(): call check() every 1800s
autonomous.check() → ReflectLoop: return '[AUTO]🤖 用户已离开超过30分钟...' prompt
ReflectLoop → GeneraticAgent.put_task(task, source='reflect'): enqueue autonomous prompt
--- Agent task execution (inside agent_runner_loop) ---
agent_runner_loop → FileSystem: read scheduled_task_sop / autonomous_operation_sop
agent_runner_loop → helper.get_todo(): read temp/TODO.txt
agent_runner_loop → helper.get_history(n): read temp/autonomous_reports/history.txt (first n lines)
agent_runner_loop → helper.complete_task(taskname, historyline, report_path): atomic task completion
helper.complete_task() → FileSystem: move report → autonomous_reports/R{N}_{taskname}.md
helper.complete_task() → FileSystem: prepend 'R{N} | {date} | {line}' to history.txt
helper.complete_task() → agent_runner_loop: return '✅ 报告已保存 + 改TODO指令'
agent_runner_loop → FileSystem: agent updates TODO.txt marking task [x] R{N}
key_relationships: agentmain --reflect loads scheduler.py (or autonomous.py) via importlib.util, hot-reloads on mtime change
ReflectLoop calls mod.check() then GeneraticAgent.put_task() — decoupled via queue
scheduler.check() imports compress_session dynamically (sys.path.insert) for L4 cron
GeneraticAgent.run() owns agent_runner_loop as a generator, streams chunks to display_queue
helper.complete_task() performs atomic 3-step: move report + prepend history + return TODO instruction
compress_session.batch_process() is 4-phase: compress→history append→zip archive→raw delete

key_methods.scheduler.check(): Returns triggered task prompt string or None. Checks L4 cron (12h), scans sche_tasks/*.json, validates schedule time window (max_delay_hours=6), cooldown via done/ filenames.
key_methods.autonomous.check(): Returns fixed '[AUTO]🤖...' string unconditionally. INTERVAL=1800s, ONCE=False.
key_methods.GeneraticAgent.run(): Dequeues tasks, builds GenericAgentHandler, calls agent_runner_loop generator, streams to display_queue.
key_methods.helper.complete_task(taskname, historyli: 1) mv report→R{N}_{taskname}.md 2) prepend formatted line to history.txt 3) return TODO update instruction string.
key_methods.helper.get_history(n=20): Returns first n lines of history.txt (newest-first).
key_methods.compress_session.compress_session(src, d: Detect format (json/raw), strip noise, rename by timestamps, write to dst_dir. Returns (dst_path, stats_dict) or (None, reason).
key_methods.compress_session.batch_process(src, l4_d: 4-phase pipeline. Skips files <2h old. Returns {processed, skipped, errors, new_sessions, deleted_raw}.

important_notes: scheduler.py uses a port-lock (127.0.0.1:45762) to prevent duplicate instances — bind failure causes agentmain crash.
Reflect loop hot-reloads script on file mtime change (no restart needed).
scheduler.check() triggers at most one task per call (first matching task returned, loop exits).
compress_session L4 cron is silent (only prints to stdout, errors logged to scheduler.log).
helper.complete_task() rolls back report move if history write fails.
autonomous.check() INTERVAL=1800s (30 min); scheduler.check() INTERVAL=120s (2 min).
ONCE=False on both scripts → infinite reflect loop.
